items.title: Planning a World Cup Watch Party at a Bar? The ‘FIFA Police’ Are Lurking
items.summary: Some businesses advertising watch parties in Canada’s two host cities are wary of running afoul of FIFA’s trademark, which protects advertising “World Cup” events.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Three dead in suspected virus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
items.summary: The World Health Organization said one case of hantavirus infection has been confirmed, with five more suspected cases under investigation.
